description: Review-only instructor credential patch template. Edit proposed_certifications after Brian review, then apply with a separate audited import step. This file does not modify instructor_catalog.json by itself.
instructions: Replace UNKNOWN proposed certification codes only after Brian confirms credentials.
Do not infer credentials from course schedules, calendar ownership, or appointment containers.
Leave expiration_date as UNKNOWN unless Brian provides the actual date.
Do not add product, inventory, payment, or Enrollware URL behavior here.
